turns.content:
<objective>
Create executable phase prompts (PLAN.md files) for Phase 21.2 (Front-Agent Switch One-Shot Agent Override).

This phase is in prototype state. Research is locked. A prototype has been implemented with L3 unit/typecheck evidence. The remaining gate is **Live UAT** (L1 evidence).

You are the subagent gsd-planner. Create detailed PLAN.md files with verification loops.

**Phase:** 21.2
**Mode:** standard (with prototype implementation existing)

<files_to_read>
- .planning/STATE.md (Project State)
- .planning/ROADMAP.md (Roadmap)
- .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md (Requirements)
- .planning/phases/21.2-front-agent-switch-one-shot-agent-override/21.2-CONTEXT.md (USER DECISIONS)
- .planning/phases/21.2-front-agent-switch-one-shot-agent-override/21.2-RESEARCH.md (Technical Research)
- .planning/phases/21.2-front-agent-switch-one-shot-agent-override/21.2-SPEC.md (Acceptance Criteria)
- .planning/phases/21.2-front-agent-switch-one-shot-agent-override/21.2-prototype-implementation-evidence-2026-05-22.md (L3 Evidence)
- .planning/phases/21.1-execute-slash-command-sdk-redesign-agent-switching-native-sd/21.1-SPEC.md (Phase 21.1 context — explicit dependency)
- .planning/phases/21.1-execute-slash-command-sdk-redesign-agent-switching-native-sd/21.1-CONTEXT.md (Phase 21.1 context — explicit dependency)
</files_to_read>

<additional_context>
**Phase description:** Research whether execute-slash-command can run a command in the main/front-facing session under a configured `mode: subagent` agent by temporarily treating that agent as `all`/`primary` for one execution only, without mutating command or agent primitives.

**Phase requirement IDs (MUST address):** `21.2-spec-2026-05-22.md` — AC-01 through AC-07

**Current status:**
- Research: ✅ COMPLETE — live OpenCode source evidence, 4 candidate solutions evaluated
- Prototype implementation: ✅ COMPLETE — L3 unit/typecheck evidence
  - `src/tools/session/execute-slash-command.ts` modified with synthetic parent prompt path
  - `tests/tools/execute-slash-command.test.ts` extended with regression tests
  - 7/7 tests pass, typecheck clean
- Live UAT: ⬜ PENDING — must restart harness and test with `gsd-progress` + `gsd-executor` + `subtask:false`

**Verdict:** PARTIAL / NEEDS LIVE UAT

**Key constraints:**
1. Non-mutation — must not write to `.opencode/commands/**`, `.opencode/agents/**`, global config
2. Metadata mode must be `synthetic-parent-prompt` — no false claims of native front-agent switching
3. Live UAT is blocking before production implementation is authorized
4. TDD mode is ENABLED — apply to eligible tasks
</additional_context>

<downstream_consumer>
Output consumed by /gsd-execute-phase. Plans need:
- Frontmatter (wave, depends_on, files_modified, autonomous)
- Tasks in XML format with read_first and acceptance_criteria fields (MANDATORY on every task)
- Verification criteria
- must_haves for goal-backward verification
</downstream_consumer>

<deep_work_rules>
Every task MUST include:
1. **`<read_first>`** — Files the executor MUST read before touching anything
2. **`<acceptance_criteria>`** — Verifiable conditions that prove task correctness (grep-verifiable, exact strings/patterns/command outputs)
3. **`<action>`** — Must include CONCRETE values, not references. Never "align X with Y" without specifying exact target state.
</deep_work_rules>

<quality_gate>
- [ ] PLAN.md files created in phase directory
- [ ] Each plan has valid frontmatter
- [ ] Tasks are specific and actionable
- [ ] Every task has `<read_first>` with at least the file being modified
- [ ] Every task has `<acceptance_criteria>` with grep-verifiable conditions
- [ ] Every `<action>` contains concrete values
- [ ] Dependencies correctly identified
- [ ] Waves assigned for parallel execution
- [ ] must_haves derived from phase goal
- [ ] Threat model included (security_enforcement is enabled)
</quality_gate>

<prototype_context>
The prototype already implements:
- Deferred `client.session.prompt()` scheduling for `subtask:false + agent` path
- Command bundle discovery through existing command discovery
- `$ARGUMENTS` expansion in command body
- Regression test proving the dispatch path

Prototype files modified:
- `src/tools/session/execute-slash-command.ts`
- `tests/tools/execute-slash-command.test.ts`

Verification commands (L3 evidence):
```bash
npx vitest run tests/tools/execute-slash-command.test.ts -t "explicit subtask false"
npm run typecheck
```
</prototype_context>

TDD mode is ENABLED. Apply TDD heuristics — business logic with defined I/O gets type: tdd. UI, config, glue code get type: execute.

**Project instructions:** Read ./AGENTS.md if exists — follow project-specific guidelines.

Write PLAN.md files to: `.planning/phases/21.2-front-agent-switch-one-shot-agent-override/`
Use padded phase prefix: `21.2` for all plan file names.
